data: Assistant Secretary for Efficiency and Renewables
Assistant Secretary for Efficiency and Renewables, Department of Energy

Filer holds this position with Franklin Mountain Operating, LLC.  The LLC is a wholly owned subsidiary of Franklin Mountain Energy Holdings, LP.  All employees of Franklin Mountain Energy Holdings, LP are technically employed at Franklin Mountain Operating, LLC.  Franklin Mountain Operating, LLC, Franklin Mountain Energy Holdings, LP and Franklin Mountain Energy Holdings, 2 LP have sold all their oil and gas assets, and are only currently in business to complete the accounting, reporting and tax work required by the sale.  All these entities will not have any other clients and are not pursuing any other business.
Co-Founder, CFO, Executive Vice President, 9/2018 - Present
Member of the Board of Directors, 6/2021 - Present
Vice Chair, Executive Committee, Governance Committee, Finance Committee, 10/2022 - 2/2025
Pearl Valley Midstream, LLC is a subsidiary of Franklin Mountain Energy Holdings 2, LP. I resigned from this entity subsequent to filing.
Registered Agent and Managing Member, 6/2016 - Present
This LLC is no longer in business.

SPABS, LLC, profit interest units (value not readily ascertainable): 20% of profits after 5% internal rate of return and 100% capital return

Ark Squared, LLC will receive 20% of the profits due to its Class A interest after a 5% annual IRR and 100% capital has been returned.  Also, income amount reflects income of profit interests received from Ark Squared, LLC.
SPABS, LLC, real estate, solar development and agricultural (current holding is reported at Part 6, Line 21.36)
I continue to participate, but the sponsor has ceased to make contributions to this defined contribution plan (2019-01-01)

The oil and gas assets that this company operated were sold in January 2025 and there are no assets or operating for this entity going forward. Thus, upon separation, I will receive a fixed severance payment on my last day of work, which equates to one year of my base salary. This payout structure has been offered to all employees pursuant to the sale of the company and will become effective upon execution of a separation agreement. (2025-01-01)

The Liberty Compensation Committee has the discretion to automatically vest these RSUs, subject to my confirmation, and I understand this matter will be considered by the Committee if and when I am confirmed. I will forfeit my unvested RSUs upon separation. (2025-01-01)

The underlying assets (held by wholly owned subsidiary companies) were sold in January 2025. Pursuant to normal and customary wind down activities required post-sale for oil and gas companies, I will receive payout of previously earned deferred compensation from Franklin Mountain Energy Holdings, LP that was held back at the time of the sale and will be paid to me after wind down costs and taxes are settled during the fourth quarter of 2025 or the first quarter of 2026 (2025-01-01)

The underlying assets (held by wholly owned subsidiary companies) were sold in January 2025. Pursuant to normal and customary wind down activities required post-sale for oil and gas companies, I will receive payout of previously earned deferred compensation from Franklin Mountain Energy Holdings 2, LP that was held back at the time of the sale and will be paid to me after wind down costs and taxes are settled during the fourth quarter of 2025 or the first quarter of 2026 (2025-01-01)

Upon confirmation, I anticipate receiving my  pro-rata earned director fees pursuant to a disclosed compensation plan for services rendered in the second quarter of 2025 and up to my date of separation as director cash fees are paid quarterly in arrears. (2021-06-01)

I am not an employee of Juniper Mesa Management, LLC. My initial capital investment was accompanied by the operating agreement of the LLC, which deemed me one of the Principals of the LLC. I do not have a formal position with Juniper Mesa Management, LLC and although I have maintained my ownership, I am a silent partner to the LLC and not involved in any decisions or operations of the business. This LLC receives carried interest from management of Juniper Mesa Partners, LP, of which I am a Limited Partner. I am still a passive investor of Juniper Mesa Management, LLC and I receive carried interest (if earned) solely based on my ownership interest in Juniper Mesa Management, LLC. (2018-09-01)

Pursuant to my ownership with ARK Squared, and the management agreement that ARK Squared, LLC holds with SPABS, LLC, I retain a profit interest in SPABS, LLC. The percentage was fixed at 20% of profits due to its general partnership interest after a 5% annual IRR and 100% capital has been returned. Payment will be made if and when the fund profits from its investments. (2018-11-01)
